name: MambaLSTM: A Spatio-Temporal Framework for Enhanced Traffic Accident Risk Prediction
summary: arXiv:2607.18353v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In traffic accident risk prediction, most studies overlook the extra noise that could be incorporated when fusing temporal features into spatial fe...
description: arXiv:2607.18353v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In traffic accident risk prediction, most studies overlook the extra noise that could be incorporated when fusing temporal features into spatial features, and some models struggle to capture global correlations among spatial regions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel traffic accident risk prediction framework named MambaLSTM. First...
author: Zhen Yu, Yachao Yuan, Zixiang Peng, Muting Li, Thar Baker
